+    total_weight = 0.0

+    for i, mf in enumerate(model_files):

+        if mf.endswith('.cbm'):

+            model = lgb.Booster(model_file=model_path)

+            pred = model.predict(X_test)

+        

+        predictions += w * normalize(pred)

+        total_weight += w

+    

+    if total_weight > 0:

+        predictions /= total_weight

+def prepare_data(df, feature_cols, label_col, use_rank=False):

+    X = df[feature_cols].values

+    if use_rank:

+        y = df[label_col + '_rank'].values

+    else:

+        y = df[label_col].values

+    mask = ~np.isnan(y)

+    X = X[mask]

+    y = y[mask]

+    X = np.where(np.isinf(X), np.nan, X)

+    return X, y, mask

+

+X_train, y_train, train_mask = prepare_data(train_df, feature_cols, label_col, use_rank=False)

+X_train_r, y_train_r, _ = prepare_data(train_df, feature_cols, label_col, use_rank=True)

+X_valid, y_valid, valid_mask = prepare_data(valid_df, feature_cols, label_col, use_rank=False)

+X_valid_r, y_valid_r, _ = prepare_data(valid_df, feature_cols, label_col, use_rank=True)
